steps.t: The missing stone is out there somewhere, waiting to be found.
The missing stone is out there somewhere, waiting to be found.
You have found a hidden chamber in the Mountains of Shadow, but a Nameless entity stands in your way.
The Emissary has asked you to find the Remnants of the Fallen Ones and return them.
You have collected the remnants for the Emissary. You should return to the Emissary and 'Speak the Words'.
You have found one of the missing stones! You should return them to their rightful place in the Crown Chamber.
